posts.author: kek_saved_the_world
posts.title:
A British woman has slaved as a bus driver for 20 years—just scraping by to pay her rent.

Her new neighbour arrived yesterday, speaks no English, and has been handed a three-bedroom flat completely free—courtesy of taxpayer money.

twitter.content:
https://t.co/hPFl3DaOap
A British woman has slaved as a bus driver for 20 years—just scraping by to pay her rent.

Her new neighbour arrived yesterday, speaks no English, and has been handed a three-bedroom flat completely free—courtesy of taxpayer money.

This isn't compassion.
